prompt: In image 1, replace the old sandals with the shoes from image 2, and change the overcast sky to the cloudy sky from image 3.
prompt_refined: Using image 1 as the base for editing: Replace the brown sandals located on the ground in the foreground with the high-top sneakers from image 2. Concurrently, replace the existing overcast sky with the blue sky featuring scattered clouds, as seen in image 3.
objects: High-top sneakers on the ground in the foreground
